title: Microsoft announces 3,200 layoffs and the largest restructuring in Xbox history, with the sale or closure of several studios
summary: The massive wave of layoffs affects Xbox Game Studios, letting go of studios such as Double Fine, Arkane, Undead Labs, Compulsion and Ninja Theory, and canceling projects like the Halo multiplayer 'Project Ekur'.

title: The end of physical discs on PlayStation generates a wave of criticism, petitions, and legal analysis
summary: Sony's decision to eliminate physical format in future consoles prompts a petition with over 120,000 signatures, statements from Hideo Kojima and experts, and doubts about the legality of the measure.

title: Nintendo will stop selling original Switch consoles in 2027 and prepares a Switch 2 revision with a removable battery
summary: Nintendo confirmed that current Switch models will be discontinued in Europe in February 2027, while it plans to launch a version of Switch 2 with a replaceable battery later in the year.

title: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma sets goal to entertain more than one billion people per day, a goal dismissed as unrealistic
summary: The executive's statements generate skepticism in the press, which points out that this figure is 24 times Steam's peak concurrent users and lacks foundation.

title: A plague outbreak in World of Warcraft spirals out of control and causes a virtual epidemic reminiscent of a 2005 incident
summary: A contagious debuff spreads across servers, killing players and filling inns with corpses, recalling the famous Corrupted Blood outbreak that was studied by scientists.

title: Meccha Chameleon sells 15 million copies in less than a month and teases a collaboration with a Japanese star
summary: The mobile painting game continues its overwhelming success and prepares a surprise with a famous Japanese personality.

title: Marvel Tokon: Fighting Souls blocks access in more than 100 countries due to the PSN account requirement
summary: Like Helldivers 2, the Marvel fighting game suffers regional restrictions on PC due to the requirement of linking with PlayStation Network, limiting its availability.

title: The revival of Persona 4 brings with it free anime on YouTube and excites fans
summary: The celebration of Persona 4's return includes the free availability of the animated adaptation on YouTube, generating great excitement among followers.

title: Microsoft confirms Halo: Campaign Evolved will be released on physical disc
summary: Amid the debate about the abandonment of physical format, Xbox and Halo Studios reaffirm their commitment to physical media with the upcoming Halo release.

title: Summer Games Done Quick 2026 begins, the charity speedrunning marathon
summary: The annual speedrunning event kicks off with a showcase of the best games and a fundraiser for charitable organizations, highlighting the positive side of the community.

title: Cyberpunk 2077 reaches a new million-sales milestone
summary: CD Projekt Red's RPG continues to add sales, demonstrating its recovery after the initial problems.

title: Nintendo's president promises to take action against Pokémon card resellers
summary: Despite having printed billions of cards, demand remains unsatisfied due to resale, and Nintendo commits to acting.

title: A union creates a relief fund for laid-off developers in the video game industry
summary: The initiative seeks to provide financial support to workers affected by the recent mass layoffs in the sector.

title: Streamer ExtraEmily is banned from Twitch after nearly causing a traffic accident live
summary: The content creator acknowledged her mistake and committed to improving after the incident that almost caused a car crash.

title: A developer reports that his game was refunded 55,000 times for lasting less than two hours
summary: Steam's refund policy harms short games, according to the creator, who criticizes the situation.

title: Palworld confirms the release date of its 1.0 update
summary: The popular survival and creature-capturing game announces when its full version will be available.

title: A stealth prequel of a Half-Life 2 mod puts you in the shoes of a Combine assassin
summary: The new installment of the 'Entropy: Zero' series expands the Half-Life 2 universe with a stealth adventure where you hunt the human resistance.

title: Dark Souls has ruined the controls of action games, according to a critical analysis
summary: An article argues that the combat system of the saga has negatively influenced the control design of many action games that do not belong to the soulslike subgenre.

title: Sonic Mania: the game that saved Sega's mascot and revitalized the franchise
summary: An analysis explains how the classic-style game restored faith in the series after years of mediocre releases.

title: The Danganronpa 2x2 remaster is delayed until 2027 and will include significant additional content
summary: The game will add an alternate story mode with 20% more content and a 3D map, but fans will have to wait until next year.
